MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Pauly De Leon is present.
Attorney Susan Parkinson appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Eliza Guerrero and Antolin Quilala are present.
Attorney Morris Hirsch representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of June-04-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
